description_long: This house is nestled within a dense forested area, surrounded by a mix of snow-covered and lush green trees, creating a striking contrast. The structure itself is modern, with clean lines and a flat roof, and is composed of several interconnected rectangular volumes. Large windows are visible, allowing for ample natural light and views of the surrounding landscape. The house appears to be partially embedded into a hillside, with some sections opening directly onto the greenery. The entryway is subtle, blending into the natural environment, and there are no prominent porches or steps visible. The overall setting gives the impression of a secluded, contemporary residence harmoniously integrated with nature.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house surrounded by dense snow-covered and green trees, blending seamlessly into a forested hillside. The structure features large windows and a minimalist design.
description_view_0: From this angle, the house is partially obscured by snow-covered trees, with green foliage visible on the right, highlighting the contrast between the two types of vegetation.
description_view_1: The front view shows the house nestled deeply among both green and snow-covered trees, with the main facade and large windows partially visible through the foliage.
description_view_2: This side view reveals more of the house's flat roof and rectangular layout, with the green hillside and trees dominating the left side of the scene.
description_view_3: The rear view is almost entirely enveloped by snow-covered trees, with only the upper portions of the house and some green foliage peeking through.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist entryway integrated into the facade, no visible porch or steps, blending with the natural surroundings
